proposed_title: Detergent Brand Preference Survey (M-User vs Non-User by Water Softness)
encoding_note: Data is pre-aggregated (Freq = count per cell). Preference=Brand X is success; sum Freq where Preference=Brand X for successes, total Freq for cases, grouped by (M_User × Water_softness). Temperature is a secondary stratum. 24 rows cover all combinations of Temperature × M_User × Preference × Water_softness.
